title: InquiTrace: A Reproducible Platform and Learning-Analytics Framework for the CER Reasoning Gap in AI-Scaffolded Primary Science Inquiry
description: Code-only, public artifacts for the InquiTrace research program: a CER-instrumented inquiry-platform design, a hybrid LLM + rule-based scaffolding-agent specification, and a reproducible learning-analytics pipeline. Ships a clearly labelled, non-real example cohort for end-to-end reproducibility. No real pupil data is distributed.
